titles.title: Everybody Will Be Happy Over There

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a happy land of promise over in the great beyond, Where the saved of earth shall soon the glory share; Where the souls of men shall enter and live on forever more, Ev'rybody will be happy over there.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Ev'rybody will be happy (over there, over there) will be happy over there, We will shout and sing His praise (praises thru the never ending ages) ; Ev'rybody will be happy over there.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Mothers, fathers, sisters, brothers will be singing 'round the throne, In that land where no one ever knows a care; And the Christians of all ages will join in the triumph song, Everybody will be happy over there.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We will hear nobody praying and no mourning in that land, For no burdens there will be for us to bear; All the people will be singing "Glory, glory to the Lamb", Everybody will be happy over there.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There we'll meet the One who saved us and who kept us by His grace, And who bro't us to that land so bright and fair; We will praise His name forever as we look upon His face, Everybody will be happy over there.
